identityOneLiner: Structured tool activity checked against read-only SQL and contract stores at verification time—not trace color.
readmeTitle: AgentSkeptic — persisted state, not trace color
heroTitle: Your trace says success. Persisted state is the verdict.
heroSubtitle: Read-only checks at verification time against your registries and stores—more than a green trace.
visitorProblemAnswer: Green is not enough when data is wrong. CLI vs read-only state: match or miss—not proof which call wrote a row. Use before ship or compliance.
heroOutcome: Traces look fine while your database is wrong. Catch that mismatch before you ship, bill, or hand off to customers.
heroMechanism: The CLI runs read-only checks against your stores from declared tool activity—at verification time, not from trace color.
guaranteeFootnote: Read-only at verification time; not proof which call wrote data. https://github.com/jwekavanagh/agentskeptic/blob/main/docs/verification-product-ssot.md

siteDefaultMetadata.title: AgentSkeptic
siteDefaultMetadata.description: Verify persisted state vs tool claims—read-only.

pageMetadata.title: Database truth vs traces
pageMetadata.description: Read-only tool checks vs stores—VERIFIED or inconsistent.

shareableTerminalDemo.title: Bundled terminal proof
shareableTerminalDemo.transcript:
### Success (`wf_complete`)

workflow_id: wf_complete
workflow_status: complete
trust: TRUSTED: Every step matched the database under the configured verification rules.
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result=Matched the database.

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_complete",
  "status": "complete",
  "steps": [{ "seq": 0, "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact", "status": "verified" }]
}

### Failure (`wf_missing`)

workflow_id: wf_missing
workflow_status: inconsistent
steps:
  - seq=0 tool=crm.upsert_contact result:Expected row is missing from the database (the log implies a write that is not present).
    reference_code: ROW_ABSENT

{
  "schemaVersion": 15,
  "workflowId": "wf_missing",
  "status": "inconsistent",
  "steps": [
    {
      "seq": 0,
      "toolId": "crm.upsert_contact",
      "status": "missing",
      "reasons": [{ "code": "ROW_ABSENT" }]
    }
  ]
}

r2.frameworkMaturity: CrewAI: ready. AutoGen: experimental. See python/FRAMEWORK_LOCK.md
